---
name: "Bug report"
about: "Report a reproducible issue in the website, docs, navigation, or docs build"
labels: ["kind/bug"]
---

## Scope
- [ ] Docs content / factual drift
- [ ] Broken link or navigation issue
- [ ] Website UI / homepage / styling
- [ ] Docs build / CI / Docusaurus behavior
- [ ] Search / metadata / SEO issue

## What happened?
Tell us what broke, what you expected, and what you saw instead.

## Minimal reproduction
1. Page URL or source file
2. Browser / device / viewport if relevant
3. Commands you ran locally (`npm run build`, `npm start`, etc.)

## Evidence
- Screenshot, video, or console output when helpful
- Broken link target(s) or exact markdown/source snippet
- If this is a docs claim issue, link the source of truth

## Additional context
Anything else we should know? For example, related pages, recent refactors, or cross-repo changes.
